title: Quran, Sura 85: Al-Buruj
description: Sura 85 (Al-Buruj: The Mansions of the Stars) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 85 (Al-Buruj: The Mansions of the Stars) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: By the sky containing great stars, and by the promised Day, and by the witness and what is witnessed.
